calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2004 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2004 Continued To Sep-17-04 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-20-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Robert R. Outis, Esq. for Plaintiff: Dennis McLeod, also present, was sworn and examined.
Exh. 1 - Consignment agreement---------------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 2 - Letter fax to Plaintiff dtd.6-24-02-------ID/EVID.
Exh. 3 - Cash Sale agreement-----------------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 4 - Damages and Interest calculation----------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Susan C. Gilner ind/dba Encore Steinway Consignment Pianos, as follows:
Principal/Damages of $5,000.00
Prejudgment interest $1,039.73
Costs of $197.30
For the total of $6,237.03
Counsel stipulated for the return of exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.
